features.name: V21 Landing Page — Final Polish Sprint

stories.title: Fix interactive demo hover-pause zone
acceptance: Hover only pauses auto-cycle when cursor is directly on the chapter list or demo area, not the full section width
Auto-cycle resumes immediately when cursor leaves the interactive area
Mobile touch behavior unchanged

stories.title: Tighten section spacing across page
acceptance: Reduced vertical padding between InteractiveDemo and WhoItsFor sections
Reduced padding above WhoItsFor heading
Reduced gap after Integrations section before Stats
Page feels tighter and flows without dead space

stories.title: Animated count-up on credibility bar stats
acceptance: 10, 200, 500, 40 animate with smooth count-up when scrolled into view
Uses useInView to trigger only once
Animation easing matches StatsV20 style (ease-out cubic)

stories.title: Scrolling integration logo marquee
acceptance: Smooth infinite-scrolling strip of integration logos below credibility bar
Uses CSS animation (not JS) for performance
Logos from logo.dev CDN with graceful fallback
Pauses on hover, duplicated set for seamless loop
Works in both light and dark mode with appropriate opacity

stories.title: Before & After comparison strip
acceptance: Two-column layout: 'Without 60' (red/negative) vs 'With 60' (green/positive)
3-4 comparison rows: time on admin, follow-up rate, tools needed, pipeline visibility
Subtle animation on scroll-in
Placed between Benefits and ProductShowcase sections
Responsive: stacks vertically on mobile

stories.title: FAQ accordion section
acceptance: 4-5 FAQ items with click-to-expand accordion behavior
Questions: setup time, CRM compatibility, data security, pricing, support
Smooth height animation on expand/collapse
Placed between Testimonials and CTA sections
Only one item open at a time

stories.title: Sticky CTA bar after hero scroll
acceptance: Slim bar slides down from top after scrolling past hero section (~600px)
Contains 'Get Started' button and optional domain input
Hides when scrolled back to hero
Smooth slide animation (translateY)
Does not conflict with NavbarV19 — positioned below it or integrated

stories.title: Trust and security badges at CTA
acceptance: Small trust badges below pricing anchor: SOC 2, GDPR, 256-bit encryption, 99.9% uptime
Subtle gray icons with text labels
Builds trust at the conversion point
Works in both light and dark mode

stories.title: Mobile testimonial carousel
acceptance: On mobile (<768px), testimonials show as swipeable carousel instead of stacked grid
Dot indicators showing current card
Auto-advances every 5 seconds
Touch swipe support via CSS scroll-snap
Desktop layout unchanged (2x2 grid)

stories.title: Persona card deep links to benefits
acceptance: Each persona card is clickable with a 'See how' link
Clicking smooth-scrolls to Benefits section
Auto-selects the most relevant benefit tab (Founders→Follow-ups, Teams→Deal health, Agencies→Pipeline)
Hover state indicates clickability
